{# preset: chirpui-app-shell #} {# target: body #} {# domain: filesystem_chrome #} {# shell: filesystem_chrome #} {% extends "chirpui/app_shell_layout.html" %} {% block brand %}Filesystem Chrome{% end %} {% block sidebar %} {% from "chirpui/sidebar.html" import sidebar, sidebar_link, sidebar_section %} {% call sidebar(current_path=current_path) %} {% call sidebar_section("Filesystem") %} {{ sidebar_link("/workspace", "Workspace", match="prefix") }} {{ sidebar_link("/admin", "Admin", match="prefix") }} {% end %} {% end %} {% end %}
